basic_01_inventory_cash.reason: Inventory Dr $100 / Cash Cr $100 matches expected. Inventory = Inventories synonym.

basic_02_inventory_on_account.reason: Inventory Dr $300 / Accounts Payable Cr $300 matches expected. AP = Trade payables synonym.

basic_03_issue_stock_with_apic.reason: Cash Dr $180 / Common Stock Cr $100 / APIC Cr $80 matches expected. Common Stock = Share capital-Common synonym.

basic_04_sell_inventory.reason: Cash Dr $500 / COGS Dr $300 / Sales Revenue Cr $500 / Inventory Cr $300 matches expected.

basic_05_pay_accounts_payable.reason: Accounts Payable Dr $50 / Cash Cr $50 matches expected. AP = Trade payables synonym.

basic_06_refinance_loan.reason: Notes Payable - Old Loan Dr $100 / Notes Payable - New Loan Cr $100 matches expected. Both are Notes payable sub-accounts.

basic_07_loan_to_equity.reason: Loan Payable Dr $200 / Common Shares Cr $200 matches expected. Loan Payable = Notes payable synonym.

basic_08_deliver_service_against_deposit.reason: Unearned Revenue Dr $100 / Service Revenue Cr $100 matches expected. Unearned Revenue = Contract liabilities synonym.

basic_09_repurchase_stock.reason: Treasury Stock Dr $200 / Cash Cr $200 matches expected. Treasury Stock = Treasury shares synonym.

basic_10_declare_dividend.reason: Dividends Dr $500,000 / Dividends Payable Cr $500,000. Expected Retained earnings Dr. Dividends is a contra-equity account that closes to RE, but the account name does not match Retained earnings.

basic_11_convert_preferred_to_common.reason: Preferred Shares Dr $100 / Common Shares Cr $100 matches expected. Preferred Shares = Share capital-Preferred synonym.

basic_12_pay_salaries.reason: Salaries Expense Dr $100 / Cash Cr $100 matches expected.

basic_13_accrue_utility.reason: Utilities Expense Dr $50 / Accounts Payable Cr $50 matches expected. AP = Accrued liabilities synonym for accrued utility context.

basic_14_casualty_loss.reason: Loss on Inventory Write-off Dr $2,000 / Inventory Cr $2,000 matches expected. Loss on Inventory Write-off = Casualty loss synonym.

basic_15_no_entry.reason: Entry has empty lines array and STUCK decision. Expected is null (no entry). Both represent no journal entry, so match.
